subject: [SDNC] Fix issue with certs from CMPv2 by Netconf (TLS)
commit_message:
[SDNC] Fix issue with certs from CMPv2 by Netconf (TLS)

- correct cmpv2Certificate to take outputType from 'certificates'
- add postStart hook for CertManagerIntegration to make cert dir writable
- add setting ODL_CERT_DIR env

Issue-ID: SDNC-1477
Signed-off-by: Piotr Marcinkiewicz <piotr.marcinkiewicz@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I4531392cc4f113b173d10a27b98b1fe97d6faa4d

Gitlab Azure 1:

Patch Set 5:

can it be tested if cert manager is available on the gating system?

Patch Set 5:

It can be tested, but it is necessary to run deployment with cmpv2Enabled and CMPv2CertManagerIntegration global values set to true. Example part of override:

global:
  cmpv2Enabled: true
  CMPv2CertManagerIntegration: true

I don't know if we can run gating with custom override

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> It can be tested, but it is necessary to run deployment with cmpv2Enabled and CMPv2CertManagerIntegration global values set to true. Example part of override:
> 
> global:
>   cmpv2Enabled: true
